goal: 集成 CI/CD 到 builder 智能体 + 集成 Git commit/push 到工作流末端（retro 验证通过后执行）。1) ci-cd-pipeline skill 更新为项目专属（bun/Vite/Vitest/Electron）；2) builder.md 新增 CI/CD 流水线阶段；3) coordinator.md 和 AGENTS.md 新增 Git 操作阶段（retro 后执行）

coverage_checklist.ci_skill_project_specific: assert: ci-cd-pipeline/SKILL.md 包含 bun/Vite/Vitest/Electron 项目专属的流水线定义
coverage_checklist.ci_skill_builder_phases: assert: ci-cd-pipeline/SKILL.md 定义 Builder CI/CD 四阶段（typecheck→lint→test→build）
coverage_checklist.ci_skill_electron_release: assert: ci-cd-pipeline/SKILL.md 包含 Electron 构建和发布参考
coverage_checklist.builder_pipeline: assert: builder.md 新增 CI/CD 流水线章节，定义四阶段执行顺序和失败策略
coverage_checklist.builder_skill_ref: assert: builder.md 引用 ci-cd-pipeline skill
coverage_checklist.coordinator_git_step: assert: coordinator.md 完整委派流程新增步骤：复盘通过后执行 git commit + push
coverage_checklist.agents_phase13: assert: AGENTS.md 伪代码新增 Phase 13：复盘通过后的 Git 操作阶段
